data.name: 选择用于保存录像的磁盘
默认跟随 Windows 显示语言，修改后重启生效
data.value: Uses the Windows display language by default. Restart to apply changes

data.name: RestartSaved
data.value: Language preference saved. Restart the application to apply it

data.name: Speech.RecordingHasNoOrderNumber
data.value: No order number is linked. Recording will continue

data.name: Speech.OrderNumberMismatch
data.value: Order number does not match. Recording will continue

data.name: Speech.VideoFileTooSmall
data.value: Video was too small and has been deleted

data.name: Speech.RecordingTooShort
data.value: Recording was too short and has been discarded

data.name: Speech.RefundWaitingSeller
data.value: Waiting for the seller to process the refund

data.name: Speech.RefundWaitingBuyerReturn
data.value: Waiting for the buyer to return the item

data.name: Speech.RefundWaitingSellerConfirm
data.value: Waiting for the seller to confirm the returned item

data.name: Speech.PrintedRefund
data.value: This order has a refund. {0}. Please verify it

data.name: 包含在线播放转码、剪辑预览和剪辑下载文件
data.value: Contains online playback transcoding, clip preview and clip download files

data.name: 倍率越高，面单越清楚，但画面范围越小
data.value: The higher the magnification, the clearer the list, but the smaller the picture range.

data.name: 本项目使用 AGPL-3.0 License 开源
data.value: This project is open source using AGPL-3.0 License

data.name: 播报买家留言和卖家备注
data.value: Report buyer messages and seller notes

data.name: 磁盘至少保留多少 GB 不给录像使用。低于安全值时会自动恢复，避免系统或其他软件没空间
data.value: The minimum number of GB that should be reserved on the disk and not used for recording. It will automatically recover when it is lower than the safe value to prevent the system or other software from running out of space.

data.name: 打包监控程序官方开源软件适用中小电商
data.value: Official open-source packing monitor for small and medium online stores

data.name: 打包结束后画面不动，就自动停止录像
data.value: After the packaging is completed, if the screen does not move, the recording will be automatically stopped.

data.name: 打包时自动播报买家留言和卖家备注，避免漏看特殊要求
data.value: Automatically broadcast buyer messages and seller notes when packaging to avoid missing special requirements

data.name: 打开 GitHub 仓库，查看源码、发布记录和问题反馈
data.value: Open the GitHub repository to view source code, release records and problem feedback

data.name: 打开软件后后台检查，有新版本时提示下载
data.value: After opening the software, it will check in the background and prompt you to download when there is a new version.

data.name: 单个录像超过这个时间就自动停止
data.value: If a single recording exceeds this time, it will automatically stop

data.name: 底层仍保存为 CQP。CQP 数值越小越清晰、文件越大；这里用更直观的方向显示
data.value: The underlying layer is still saved as CQP. The smaller the CQP value, the clearer and larger the file; here it is displayed in a more intuitive direction.

data.name: 电脑开机后自动启动本程序
data.value: This program will automatically start after the computer is turned on.

data.name: 端口是浏览器访问服务时使用的数字，例如 http://电脑IP:端口
data.value: The port is the number used by the browser to access the service, such as http://computer IP:port

data.name: 多数连续字符间隔低于该值时，也可认为是扫码枪输入
data.value: When the interval between most consecutive characters is lower than this value, it can also be considered as input from a code scanner.

data.name: 二次修改分发时请保留原作者署名、版权声明和许可证信息
data.value: Please retain the original author's signature, copyright statement and license information when making secondary modifications and distribution.

data.name: 发货或退货扫到退款单时继续录像并按退款状态连续报警
data.value: When a refund order is scanned for shipment or return, the video will continue to be recorded and the alarm will be sent continuously according to the refund status.

data.name: 方便事后确认这段录像对应哪个订单
data.value: It is convenient to confirm later which order this video corresponds to.

data.name: 防止单个录像录得太久
data.value: Prevent a single video from being recorded for too long

data.name: 防止扫码枪连续触发太快
data.value: Prevent the code scanner from triggering too quickly continuously

data.name: 访问录像、播放和剪辑时验证专用链接，订单插件不受影响
data.value: Verify the dedicated link when accessing recording, playback and editing, and the order plug-in will not be affected

data.name: 访问密钥会包含在复制的完整访问链接中，请不要发送给无关人员
data.value: The access key will be included in the copied full access link, please do not send it to unrelated persons.

data.name: 放大画面保持多久后恢复
data.value: How long does the zoomed-in screen last before it resumes?

data.name: 负数表示让音频提前，正数表示让音频延后；通常保持 0
data.value: A negative number means to advance the audio, a positive number means to delay the audio; usually kept at 0

data.name: 个人学习、自家店铺自用可以免费使用
data.value: It can be used free of charge for personal study and self-use in your own store.

data.name: 画面不动超过这个时间后停止录像
data.value: Stop recording after the screen remains motionless for more than this time

data.name: 画面没变化时自动结束录像
data.value: Automatically end recording when the picture does not change

data.name: 缓存包含在线播放转码、剪辑预览图和剪辑下载文件，超出上限后会自动清理最旧文件
data.value: The cache contains online playback transcoding, clip previews, and clip download files. The oldest files will be automatically cleared after the upper limit is exceeded.

data.name: 建议与普通播报使用不同角色，便于区分警告提示
data.value: It is recommended to use different roles from ordinary broadcasts to facilitate the differentiation of warning prompts.

data.name: 仅限同码停录
data.value: Only stop recording with the same code

data.name: 开启后，超时、停录和订单信息会用语音提醒
data.value: When turned on, voice reminders will be given for timeouts, recording stops and order information.

data.name: 每次播报前取消静音并将电脑音量调到最大
data.value: Unmute and set the computer volume to maximum before each announcement

data.name: 开启后放大和恢复时会有平滑动画
data.value: When turned on, there will be smooth animation when zooming in and restoring.

data.name: 开始录制后等待多久再放大
data.value: How long to wait after starting recording before zooming in

data.name: 可跟随系统，或固定为浅色 / 深色主题
data.value: Can follow the system or be fixed to light/dark theme

data.name: 空闲超过这个时间后关闭摄像头
data.value: Turn off the camera after being idle for longer than this time

data.name: 空闲时省资源，有操作时再恢复
data.value: Save resources when idle and resume when operations are required

data.name: 快要自动停止录像前，提前多久提醒
data.value: How long to remind before automatically stopping recording

data.name: 连续字符平均间隔低于该值时，认为更像扫码枪高速输入
data.value: When the average interval between consecutive characters is lower than this value, it is considered more like high-speed input with a code scanner.

data.name: 浏览器访问用的端口，保存后自动重启服务
data.value: The port used for browser access, and the service will be automatically restarted after saving.

data.name: 录像编码异常时，用它重新检测电脑能力
data.value: When the video encoding is abnormal, use it to re-test the computer's capabilities.

data.name: 录像会按列表顺序保存。某个磁盘只剩下预留空间时，会自动换到下一个磁盘；系统盘默认至少预留 30GB 或 10%，其他磁盘至少预留 20GB 或 5%，以较大值为准
data.value: Videos will be saved in list order. When a disk only has reserved space left, it will be automatically changed to the next disk; by default, at least 30GB or 10% is reserved for the system disk, and at least 20GB or 5% is reserved for other disks, whichever is larger.

data.name: 录制开始时先放大中心画面，停留一会儿后再恢复
data.value: When recording starts, zoom in on the center image, stay there for a while, and then restore it.

data.name: 配置录像保存位置，以及每个磁盘要留给系统和其他软件的空间
data.value: Configure the recording storage location and the space on each disk to be reserved for the system and other software

data.name: 清除已保存的显卡编码检测结果，下次重新判断可用编码器
data.value: Clear the saved graphics card encoding detection results and re-judge the available encoders next time

data.name: 软件在后台也能扫码开始录制
data.value: The software can also scan the QR code to start recording in the background.

data.name: 扫码内容至少达到这个长度才会提交。全局键盘监听和无回车窗口内识别都会用到
data.value: The scanned code content will be submitted if it reaches at least this length. Both global keyboard monitoring and recognition within a carriage-enter-free window are used.

data.name: 扫码枪可能连续发送多次内容，这里用于避免重复触发录制切换
data.value: The code scanner may send content multiple times in succession. This is used to avoid triggering the recording switch repeatedly.

data.name: 扫码枪没开自动回车时打开。需要软件窗口在前台
data.value: Enable when the scanner does not send Enter. The application window must be in the foreground

data.name: 扫码枪没有自动回车时使用。只在软件窗口内识别，避免影响其他程序输入
data.value: Use when the scanner does not send Enter. Recognition is limited to this window so other applications are unaffected

data.name: 扫描残留的 MKV 和 WAV，合并为 MP4
data.value: Scan residual MKV and WAV and merge into MP4

data.name: 商品名太长时，用这些词自动停顿
data.value: When the product name is too long, use these words to automatically pause

data.name: 少于这个时长的视频不保存
data.value: Videos shorter than this length will not be saved

data.name: 使用前请自行确认你的使用方式是否满足 AGPL-3.0 要求
data.value: Before use, please confirm whether your usage meets the requirements of AGPL-3.0

data.name: 使用在线语音时的警告提示声音
data.value: Warning sound when using online voice

data.name: 使用在线语音时的普通提示声音
data.value: Normal prompt sound when using online voice

data.name: 视频文件被清理后，列表里仍显示这条记录
data.value: After the video file is cleaned, this record is still displayed in the list

data.name: 输入一段文字，试听当前播报效果
data.value: Enter a piece of text to listen to the current broadcast effect

data.name: 数值越小，对手动输入越严格
data.value: The smaller the value, the stricter the manual input

data.name: 太短的不当作单号，防止误触发
data.value: If it is too short, it will not be regarded as an order number to prevent false triggering.

data.name: 太短的视频自动丢弃
data.value: Videos that are too short will be automatically discarded

data.name: 停顿越短越灵敏，越长越不易误触
data.value: The shorter the pause, the more sensitive it is; the longer the pause, the less likely it is to accidentally touch.

data.name: 同一网络里的电脑或手机可以用浏览器查看录像，首次开启可能请求管理员权限
data.value: Computers or mobile phones on the same network can use a browser to view the recording. Administrator permissions may be required when opening it for the first time.

data.name: 往右更清晰，往左更省空间
data.value: Move to the right for clearer view, move to the left to save space.

data.name: 无回车窗口内识别时，最后一次输入后超过这个时间没有新字符，才判断一次扫码是否完成
data.value: Without Enter, a scan is submitted only after no new characters arrive for this period

data.name: 系统语音不需要网络；联网语音声音更自然；离线语音使用本地模型，需要额外运行依赖
data.value: System voice does not require a network; networked voice sounds more natural; offline voice uses a local model and requires additional running dependencies.

data.name: 小于该大小的视频会自动删除；填 0 表示不限制
data.value: Videos smaller than this size will be automatically deleted; fill in 0 to indicate no limit

data.name: 修改后对外分发或提供网络服务时，需要遵守 AGPL-3.0 的开源义务
data.value: When distributing or providing network services after modification, you need to comply with the open source obligations of AGPL-3.0

data.name: 需要保留现场声音时开启
data.value: Turn on when you need to preserve live sound

data.name: 选择录制声音使用的麦克风
data.value: Select the microphone used to record sound

data.name: 选择拍摄打包过程的摄像头
data.value: Choose a camera to capture the packaging process

data.name: 选择提醒声音使用系统语音、联网语音还是离线语音
data.value: Choose whether the reminder sound uses system voice, online voice, or offline voice

data.name: 选择这台电脑负责录像还是打印
data.value: Choose whether this computer is responsible for recording or printing

data.name: 影响录像体积和播放兼容性
data.value: Affects video size and playback compatibility

data.name: 用显卡帮忙录像，降低电脑占用
data.value: Use a graphics card to help record and reduce computer usage

data.name: 用于兼容偶尔有抖动的扫码枪
data.value: For compatibility with scanners that occasionally jitter

data.name: 用于判断扫码内容是不是有效单号
data.value: Used to determine whether the scanned code is a valid order number

data.name: 用于重复单号、非法单号等提醒
data.value: Used to remind duplicate order numbers, illegal order numbers, etc.

data.name: 优先使用显卡进行视频编码，可降低 CPU 占用；如果录像异常，可改为自动或 CPU
data.value: Prioritize using the graphics card for video encoding, which can reduce CPU usage; if the recording is abnormal, it can be changed to automatic or CPU

data.name: 越高越流畅，也更占空间
data.value: The higher it is, the smoother it is, and it also takes up more space.

data.name: 越高越清晰，文件也越大
data.value: The higher it is, the clearer it is and the larger the file is.

data.name: 再次扫描同一单号才停止录像，扫到其他单号不停止
data.value: Scan the same order number again to stop recording. Scan other order numbers and it will not stop.

data.name: 原单号离开画面多久后，才允许摄像头再次确认
data.value: How long the original code must leave the frame before the camera can confirm it again

data.name: 同码重新出现后，在该时间内识别到 3 次即可停录
data.value: Stop after the same code is recognized 3 times within this window after reappearing

data.name: 长时间不用时关闭摄像头
data.value: Turn off the camera when not in use for an extended period of time

data.name: 正则表达式用于过滤非法扫码内容。不了解正则时请不要修改
data.value: Regular expressions are used to filter illegal code scanning content. Please do not modify it if you do not understand the regular rules.

data.name: 只有声音和画面不同步时再调整
data.value: Only adjust if the sound and picture are out of sync

data.name: 至少 16 个字符；留空会自动生成，修改后旧链接立即失效
data.value: At least 16 characters; if left blank, it will be automatically generated. After modification, the old link will become invalid immediately.

data.name: 重新检查打包模式、摄像头、麦克风和扫码枪
data.value: Recheck packaging mode, camera, microphone and scanner

data.name: Edge 声线来自微软在线语音服务，网络不可用时会回退到系统语音
data.value: Edge voice comes from Microsoft's online voice service and will fall back to system voice when the network is unavailable.

data.name: H.265/HEVC 体积更小，但部分电脑或浏览器可能无法直接播放；H.264 兼容性更好
data.value: H.265/HEVC is smaller, but some computers or browsers may not be able to play it directly; H.264 has better compatibility

data.name: Kokoro 声线编号由本地模型决定；不了解时保持默认即可
data.value: Kokoro's voice number is determined by the local model; if you don't know, just keep the default

data.name: 按这台电脑连接的硬件选择。普通查看视频的电脑，可直接用浏览器访问监控地址。
data.value: Select the hardware this computer is connected to. For ordinary computers that view videos, you can directly access the monitoring address using a browser.

data.name: 按最基础的步骤确认打包模式、摄像头、麦克风和扫码枪。
data.value: Follow the most basic steps to confirm the packaging mode, camera, microphone and code scanner.

data.name: 把快递助手里的买家留言、卖家备注发送到监控工位，打包时自动播报。
data.value: Send the buyer's message and seller's remarks in the express assistant to the monitoring station, and automatically broadcast them when packaging.

data.name: 点击任意位置或扫码唤醒
data.value: Click anywhere or scan the QR code to wake up

data.name: 能看到实时画面，就说明摄像头基础配置正常。
data.value: If you can see the real-time picture, it means that the basic configuration of the camera is normal.

data.name: 请选择这台电脑的用途
data.value: Please select what you want to use this computer for

data.name: 请用扫码枪扫描一个快递面单条码。检测到自动回车时可后台扫码；没有自动回车时会切到窗口内识别。
data.value: Please use a code scanner to scan the barcode of an express delivery receipt. When an automatic carriage return is detected, the code can be scanned in the background; when there is no automatic carriage return, the code will be switched to the window for identification.

data.name: 如果这台电脑第一次使用，请先自动查找摄像头监控工位。
data.value: If this computer is used for the first time, please automatically search for the camera monitoring station first.

data.name: 扫描单号开始录制，再次扫描同一单号停止录制。
data.value: Scan the tracking number to start recording, scan the same tracking number again to stop recording.

data.name: 扫描新单号后，自动结束上一单并开始下一单。
data.value: After scanning the new order number, the previous order will be automatically ended and the next order will be started.

data.name: 摄像头已休眠
data.value: The camera has gone to sleep

data.name: 说话时音量条有跳动，就说明麦克风基础配置正常。
data.value: If the volume bar jumps when speaking, it means that the basic configuration of the microphone is normal.

data.name: 提示：没有安装本程序的普通电脑，也可以直接用浏览器打开摄像头监控工位显示的地址查看视频。
data.value: Tip: For ordinary computers that do not have this program installed, you can also directly use a browser to open the address displayed at the camera monitoring station to view the video.

data.name: 填写或自动查找到监控端地址后，订单备注会发送到对应工位。
data.value: After filling in or automatically finding the monitoring terminal address, the order notes will be sent to the corresponding workstation.

data.name: 同一局域网内的电脑、手机等设备，可以通过主界面底部显示的局域网访问地址，打开打包视频和回放页面。请确认这些设备连接在同一个局域网内。
data.value: Computers, mobile phones and other devices within the same LAN can open the packaged video and playback page through the LAN access address displayed at the bottom of the main interface. Please make sure these devices are connected to the same LAN.

data.name: 推荐连续打包模式，扫码下一单时自动保存上一单。
data.value: The continuous packaging mode is recommended, and the previous order will be automatically saved when you scan the QR code to place an order.

data.name: 下面是日常打包流程。
data.value: The following is the daily packaging process.

data.name: 这台电脑接打印机或使用快递助手，把订单发送到摄像头监控工位。
data.value: This computer is connected to a printer or a courier assistant is used to send the order to the camera monitoring station.

data.name: 这台电脑接摄像头，负责实时监控、扫码录像、语音播报和接收订单。
data.value: This computer is connected to the camera and is responsible for real-time monitoring, scanning code recording, voice broadcasting and receiving orders.

data.name: 快递单打印工位：未连接
快递单打印工位：等待服务启动
快递单打印工位：Web 启动失败
快递单打印工位：等待连接
Main.PrintNoRefund
data.value: Shipping-label station: {0} Responded; no refund orders found

data.name: Main.ConnectionEmptyTip
data.value: Connected web pages, the userscript, and print-station apps appear here

data.name: 编码器检测失败，已保留现有设置
data.value: Encoder detection failed, existing settings retained

data.name: 部分历史录像转换失败，已保留原文件
data.value: The conversion of some historical videos failed and the original files have been retained.

data.name: 部分视频合成失败，已保留原文件
data.value: Part of the video synthesis failed, the original file has been retained

data.name: 成功：编码器重新检测完成
处理中：编码器环境检测中，请稍后打开设置...
data.value: Processing: Detecting encoder environment. Open Settings again shortly...

data.name: 处理中：检测已在运行中...
处理中：正在重新检测 GPU 编码器，请稍候...
当前录像未绑定单号，无法同码停录
data.value: The current recording has no order number and cannot be stopped by rescanning

data.name: 当前没有可复制的访问地址
data.value: There is currently no access address to copy

data.name: 画面静止超时，自动停录
data.value: The picture freezes and timeout occurs, and the recording automatically stops.

data.name: 警告：存储路径不可写，请检查磁盘
data.value: Warning: Storage path is not writable, please check disk

data.name: 警告：目标摄像头未连接，等待重新插入
data.value: Warning: Target camera is not connected and is waiting to be reinserted

data.name: 警告：摄像头唤醒后没有画面，未开始录制
data.value: Warning: There is no picture after the camera wakes up and the recording has not started.

data.name: 警告：摄像头连接发生错误，尝试重连...
data.value: Warning: Camera connection error occurred, try to reconnect...

data.name: 警告：摄像头未就绪，请检查连接
data.value: Warning: Camera not ready, please check connection

data.name: 警告：摄像头信号丢失，尝试重连...
data.value: Warning: Camera signal lost, try to reconnect...

data.name: 警告：摄像头已断开，等待重新连接...
data.value: Warning: Camera has been disconnected, waiting to be reconnected...

data.name: 警告：视频文件太小，已删除
data.value: Warning: Video file is too small and has been deleted

data.name: 警告：未检测到任何摄像头
警告：未找到 FFmpeg，无法录制
data.value: Warning: FFmpeg not found, unable to record

data.name: 警告：音轨校验失败，已保留原始文件
data.value: Warning: Track verification failed, original file retained

data.name: 警告：音频录制失败，已保留原始文件
data.value: Warning: Audio recording failed, original file retained

data.name: 警告：音频疑似提前静音，已保留原始文件
data.value: Warning: The audio is suspected to have been muted in advance, the original file has been retained

data.name: 警告：预览画面卡住，正在重连摄像头...
data.value: Warning: The preview screen is stuck, reconnecting the camera...

data.name: 录像保存失败，请检查日志
data.value: Video saving failed, please check the log

data.name: 录制状态正在切换，请稍后再试
data.value: The recording status is switching, please try again later.

data.name: 扫码过快，已保留最后一个单号
data.value: Scans arrived too quickly; the latest order number was kept

data.name: 摄像头停止失败，请重新插拔后重试
data.value: The camera failed to stop, please plug it in again and try again.

data.name: 摄像头停止失败，未继续重连
data.value: The camera failed to stop and did not continue to reconnect.

data.name: 摄像头未能进入休眠，请重新插拔后重试
data.value: The camera failed to enter sleep mode, please re-plug and try again.

data.name: 摄像头未能停止，暂时无法打开配置向导
data.value: The camera failed to stop and the configuration wizard cannot be opened temporarily.

data.name: 摄像头已重连，当前录像已保存，请重新扫码继续
data.value: The camera has been reconnected and the current video has been saved. Please scan the QR code again to continue.

data.name: 视频合成失败，已保留原文件
data.value: Video synthesis failed, the original file has been retained

data.name: 提示：配置已保存，摄像头配置将在录制结束后生效
data.value: Tip: The configuration has been saved and the camera configuration will take effect after the recording is completed.

data.name: 提示：配置已保存，重启相机
data.value: Tip: The configuration has been saved, restart the camera

data.name: 提示：已达最大录像限制时长
已打开监控网页，复制失败请重试
data.value: The monitoring webpage has been opened. Copying failed. Please try again.

data.name: 已复制并打开监控网页
data.value: Copied and opened the monitoring web page

data.name: 正在应用局域网服务设置...
按步骤完成打包模式、摄像头自动识别、麦克风和可选扫码枪
data.value: Follow the steps to configure packing mode, camera barcode recognition, microphone, and the optional scanner

data.name: 将面单条形码放入引导框，可同时测试摄像头画面和自动识别
data.value: Place the shipping-label barcode inside the guide to test the camera and recognition

data.name: 将面单条形码放入框内
data.value: Place the shipping-label barcode inside the guide

data.name: 摄像头可直接识别面单条形码；扫码枪作为后备方案长期保留，需要时可在这里测试
data.value: The camera can read shipping-label barcodes directly; the scanner remains available as a fallback and can be tested here

data.name: 点击任意位置唤醒，再将面单放入识别框
data.value: Click anywhere to wake the camera, then place the label inside the recognition guide

data.name: 将条形码放入预览引导框，稳定识别后自动开始或切换录像
data.value: Place the barcode inside the preview guide to start or switch recordings after a stable read

data.name: 无需扫码枪，也能自动开始录像
将面单条形码放入预览引导框，稳定识别后会自动开始或切换录像
data.value: Place the shipping-label barcode inside the preview guide to start or switch recordings after a stable read

data.name: 扫码枪仍可同时使用，建议保留作为后备
data.value: Your scanner will keep working and can remain connected as a fallback

data.name: 支持常见快递面单的一维条码，商品条码不会触发录像
data.value: Common shipping-label barcodes are supported; product barcodes will not start recording

data.name: 已启用摄像头识别面单
已保留当前设置，可随时在设置中开启
data.value: Current setting kept; camera recognition can be enabled in Settings at any time

data.name: 高峰时段不休眠
data.value: Keep camera awake during peak hours

data.name: 达到空闲超时时才检查，两个时段默认留空
data.value: Checked only when the idle timeout is reached; both periods are empty by default

data.name: 不休眠时段 {0} 请填写完整的 HH:mm 开始和结束时间，或全部留空
data.value: Enter both the HH:mm start and end times for no-sleep period {0}, or leave both empty

data.name: 完成向导后会显示手机连接二维码。手机与这台电脑连接同一个局域网，扫码即可打开打包视频和回放页面。
data.value: A phone connection QR code will appear after the wizard. Connect the phone to the same LAN as this computer and scan it to open recordings and playback.

data.name: 用手机或其他电脑查看录像
data.value: View recordings on a phone or another computer

data.name: 手机或其他电脑连接同一个局域网后，扫描二维码或复制网址即可打开
data.value: Connect the phone or another computer to the same LAN, then scan the QR code or copy the URL to open the page

data.name: 此网址包含录像访问密钥，请不要发送给无关人员
data.value: This URL contains the recording access key. Do not share it with unrelated people

data.name: 暂时无法生成二维码
data.value: Unable to generate a QR code right now

data.name: 手机或其他电脑连接同一个局域网后，可扫码或复制网址打开录像网页
data.value: Connect the phone or another computer to the same LAN, then scan or copy the URL to open the recordings page

data.name: 首次介绍状态保存失败，下次启动会重新显示
data.value: Failed to save the welcome guide status. It will be shown again next time.

data.name: 请先完成当前录像，再配置电脑录像
data.value: Finish the current recording before configuring PC recording.

data.name: 一套程序，同时管理电脑录像、手机录像备份和订单联动
data.value: One app for PC recording, mobile backup, and order integration

data.name: 功能始终可用，无需提前选择
摄像头识别面单，也兼容扫码枪
data.value: Camera waybill recognition with scanner support

data.name: 手机独立录像，电脑负责校验和保存
data.value: Record on mobile and verify and store on the PC

data.name: 同步留言、备注、商品和退款信息
data.value: Sync messages, notes, products, and refunds

data.name: 第一次进入某个功能时，再完成该功能自己的配置
data.value: Configure each feature when you first open it

data.name: 手机版是独立 APP，使用与电脑版相同的网盘下载入口。电脑、手机和打印电脑需要连接同一个局域网。
data.value: The mobile app is separate and uses the same download page as the PC app. Keep all devices on the same LAN.

data.name: 打开电脑版与手机版下载页
进入概览后，选择你现在要使用的功能即可。录像、备份和订单联动可以同时运行。
data.value: Choose any feature from Overview. Recording, backup, and order integration can run together.

data.name: 录像 · 备份 · 订单
电脑录像、手机备份和订单联动可以同时使用
data.value: PC recording, mobile backup, and order integration can run together

data.name: 使用电脑摄像头录像，可用摄像头识别面单，也兼容扫码枪
data.value: Record with the PC camera and recognize waybills by camera or scanner

data.name: 手机可独立录像，完成后备份到这台电脑并统一进入录像库
data.value: Record on mobile, then back up to this PC and the shared video library

data.name: 同步留言、备注、商品和退款信息，可同时发送到多台电脑
data.value: Sync order details to multiple PCs at the same time

data.name: 手机录像与电脑录像互不影响，备份完成后统一进入录像库
data.value: Mobile and PC recording work independently and share one video library

data.name: 手机版是独立 APP，APK 不包含在电脑版安装包中
data.value: The mobile app is separate; its APK is not included in the PC package

data.name: 本机和多个远程录像电脑可以同时接收留言、备注、商品与退款信息
data.value: This PC and multiple remote PCs can receive order details together

data.name: 电脑录像和手机备份录像统一保存在这里，并保留来源标签
data.value: PC and mobile recordings are stored here with source labels

data.name: 手机录像和电脑录像可以同时使用，都会进入同一个录像库
data.value: Mobile and PC recording can run together and share one library

data.name: APK 不包含在电脑版安装包中。安装后点击“连接电脑”并扫描上面的二维码，录像完成后会自动加入备份队列。
data.value: The APK is separate. Install it, tap Connect to PC, scan the QR code, and completed recordings will enter the backup queue.

data.name: 订单信息可以同时发送到当前电脑和多台远程录像/备份电脑
data.value: Send order information to this PC and multiple remote PCs

data.name: 当前电脑接收订单信息
手机独立录像，电脑负责接收、校验并统一保存到录像库
data.value: Record on mobile; this PC receives, verifies, and stores recordings in one library

data.name: 手机 APP 连接后将在这里显示设备名称
data.value: Connected mobile apps will appear here

data.name: 本机和多台远程电脑可以同时接收留言、备注、商品与退款信息
data.value: This PC and multiple remote PCs can receive messages, notes, products, and refunds together

data.name: 安装页会写入当前启用的全部目标，不再逐个 IP 嗅探
data.value: The installer writes all enabled targets without scanning IP addresses one by one

data.name: 向所有启用目标发送测试订单，并分别显示是否确认收到
data.value: Send a test order to every enabled target and show each acknowledgement

data.name: 已恢复为上次保存的设置
